title: App Features
excerpt: Learn how to use FileNamer to design custom file naming templates, fill parameters dynamically, and batch-rename local files entirely in your browser.

title: Getting Started
excerpt: Step-by-step tutorial guiding new users through preset templates, field customization, live previews, and batch file renaming in FileNamer.

title: Offline & PWA Support
excerpt: Learn how to install FileNamer as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on macOS, iOS, Android, and Windows for fully offline file renaming.

title: Academic Papers
excerpt: Organize your research literature, essays, and PDF libraries. Learn how to standardize academic paper filenames using FileNamer.

title: Invoices & Receipts
excerpt: Streamline your accounting and bookkeeping files. Learn how to standardize invoice and receipt filenames with FileNamer.

title: Media Library
excerpt: Standardize your movie and TV show libraries for Plex, Radarr, and Sonarr. Learn how to format media filenames with FileNamer.

title: Project Files
excerpt: Learn how to structure and standardize your project files using FileNamer. Keep your team organized with consistent naming conventions.

title: Template Management Guide
excerpt: Learn how to save custom naming schemas, import or export JSON templates, and share presets with your team.

title: UTM Campaign Builder
headings: 1. Renaming Creative Assets to Match Campaign Structures
2. Auto-populating Campaign Fields from Uploaded Filenames
3. Bulk UTM Generation via CSV URL Lists
excerpt: Learn how to use UTM/URL campaign templates with FileNamer, configure query parameters, and utilize the uploader feature to generate and track links.
